_comment: Fill after each deployment. All skills reference this file. Do NOT guess addresses: launchpad ids come from the publish tx; Cetus shared-object ids (GlobalConfig/Pools/BurnManager/RewarderVault) come from Cetus docs or `mvr resolve @cetuspackages/clmm|lpburn`.

quotes._comment: Cetus allowed_pair_config confirmed for SUI and USDC at tick_spacing 200 (1% fee tier). Thresholds sized for ~$25k graduation market cap (= 5 x threshold) at SUI ~= 0.7 USDC (2026-07-07), deliberately low for the current thin Sui meme volume; all values adjustable later via update_quote / set_launch_params (AdminCap), affecting new launches only.

SUI._minTvlTargetHuman: 105,000 SUI; on-chain rule additionally enforces >= tvl_target_multiplier (default 3) x the launch's graduation mcap

USDC._minTvlTargetHuman: 75,000 USDC; on-chain rule additionally enforces >= tvl_target_multiplier (default 3) x the launch's graduation mcap

mainnet._cetusSource: Cetus shared-object ids from the official cetus-skills repo (skills/cetus-clmm, CetusProtocol/cetus-skills); re-verify on-chain before first mainnet tx. lpBurnManager/cetusRewarderVault are not covered by that skill: take them from the cetus-clmm-interface lp_burn README / Cetus docs at deploy time.

testnet._cetusSource: From the cetus-clmm-interface lp_burn README (mainnet-v1.52.3). cetusPools (factory Pools) testnet id still to fill from Cetus docs.
